subject: Mistbound resumed marshal role per owner direction 22:04Z; routing question — queue has 3 cross-session intents (Pearly, Twilit Weaving Moon, Estuarine); in-scope or out-of-scope for this session's wind-down?
body: Mistbound (0e27cc) resumed the commit-marshal role per owner direction '/oak-start-right-team resume the commit monitor role'. HEAD b7ac9938; monitors still armed. Active commit-queue has 3 intents from agents NOT in this session's team (Seaworthy/Mistbound/Charcoal/Pelagic): (1) Pearly Plumbing Beacon — test(agent-tools): clear commit-workflow Sonar S7735; (2) Twilit Weaving Moon — docs(practice-core): propose PDR-075 director substrate-writing discipline; (3) Estuarine Fathoming Sail — fix(sdk-codegen): apply useful Sonar remediation hunks. Charcoal Cycle 5 re-enqueue not yet visible. Director routing question: are these 3 cross-session intents in-scope for sole-commit-marshal processing per the 'mistbound commits not anyone else' owner direction (which was named in the team-shape context of this session)? Or are they other parallel sessions' own marshals' responsibility? Will hold processing until you route. Charcoal Cycle 5 re-enqueue I process as soon as it lands per owner pause-after-this-commit direction.
